raw_consumer_statement: I made a reservation for a car rental through XXXX using my Citi credit card ending in XXXX. The website states there is a XXXX hour period to cancel the reservation. Within that time frame my plans had changed and I made a second reservation, then attempted to cancel the first reservation within the time frame that is clearly stated on the website. When I attempted to cancel the first reservation, I clicked the link to click, and it gave me several options, but not one to cancel, it only provided a phone number. I then attempted to cancel the second reservation within the allowed time frame, and I had the same issue, no option to cancel once the link was clicked, only a phone number. So I contacted the rental car company directly through that number listed, and they told me I'd have to cancel on the website, but again, the website did not have that option. I then contacted my credit card company and filed two disputes, one for each reservation. They denied my dispute, even though I requested the cancellation within the appropriate time frame. I asked the credit card company to refile the dispute, but they have not responded. The XXXX Case ID # 's are : XXXX and XXXX, in the amounts of {$920.00} and {$760.00}.
